ops.title: Force fleet re-render to pick up marketplace autoUpdate flags
ops.description: After cc-skills settings-base.json gains autoUpdate:true on cc-notes/cc-context/captain-hook entries, dispatch `gh api repos/yasyf/<repo>/dispatches -f event_type=cc-guides-render` for the sibling consumers (cc-context, cc-review, cc-present, cc-transcript, slop-cop, cc-notes); remaining ~40 fleet consumers heal at the daily 17:09 UTC cron.

ops.text: curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yasyf/<repo>/main/.claude/settings.json | jq '.extraKnownMarketplaces | map_values(.autoUpdate)' shows true for every entry on cc-present, cc-review, and slop-cop
each dispatched repo's .claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock cc-skills pin moved past the settings-base autoUpdate commit
